# This file assigns ownership for parts of the codebase.
# When a pull request changes files in a path, the assigned owners are automatically requested for review.
# Lines starting with '#' are comments.

# Default owners for any file not otherwise matched
* @your-org/platform-team

# Core repository configuration and automation
/.github/ @your-org/platform-team
/architecture/ @your-org/architecture-team
/automation/ @your-org/automation-team
/templates/ @your-org/docs-team

# --- Stacks ---
# Assign a placeholder lead team for each technology stack.
/stacks/infrastructure/ @your-org/infrastructure-leads
/stacks/cloud-platforms/ @your-org/cloud-leads
/stacks/digital-workplace/ @your-org/workplace-leads
/stacks/cybersecurity/ @your-org/security-leads
/stacks/development-automation/ @your-org/devops-leads
/stacks/data-platforms/ @your-org/data-leads
/stacks/ai-engineering/ @your-org/ai-leads
/stacks/operations-observability/ @your-org/operations-leads
/stacks/service-management/ @your-org/itsm-leads
/stacks/migration-engineering/ @your-org/migration-leads
/stacks/business-continuity/ @your-org/bcdr-leads
/stacks/architecture/ @your-org/architecture-leads
/stacks/governance-compliance/ @your-org/grc-leads
/stacks/documentation-engineering/ @your-org/docs-team
/stacks/career-development/ @your-org/hr-tech-leads
/stacks/lessons-learned/ @your-org/sre-leads
